name: minecraft-launcher
description: Production-ready Minecraft Launcher built with Tauri

scripts.install-all: npm install && npm install --prefix renderer && npm install --prefix sidecar
scripts.build: npm run build:sidecar && npm run build:renderer && npm run build:tauri
scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix renderer && npm run lint --prefix sidecar
scripts.clean: rmdir /s /q renderer/out renderer/.next sidecar/dist src-tauri/src-tauri/target 2>nul || true
